## Investment View
FORM scores 69/100 as a constructive_watch setup. The score is driven mainly by the technical breakout picture and ENTRY_READY status, with 4 constructive versus 4 adverse stock-specific signals and a market overlay impact of 0 supportive versus 0 adverse effects.

- Thesis: The setup is actionable only while the breakout level continues to hold and recent constructive signals, including the broader market overlay when relevant, keep getting follow-through.

## What Matters
- Price is holding above the prior 20-day high (126.30), a basic breakout confirmation signal. (high)
- Volume anomaly is strong at 2.71, which supports the move. (high)

## Risks / Invalidation
- A close back below 126.30 would weaken or invalidate the current breakout picture. (high)
- Recent adverse headline could still cap follow-through: 2026-04-13: B. Riley Securities Downgrades FormFactor(FORM.US) to Hold Rating, Raises Target Price to &#36;130 - 富途牛牛. (medium)

- 2026-04-08: FormFactor to Announce First Quarter 2026 Financial Results - National Today. (medium)
- 2026-04-08: FormFactor to Announce First Quarter 2026 Financial Results on April 29th - The Globe and Mail. (medium)
